title: mesembryanthemum schlechteri
intro: Mesembryanthemum schlechteri, commonly known as the 'ice plant', is a succulent plant species native to the Southern African region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and protect wounds, as well as reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair. The health benefits of Mesembryanthemum schlechteri include its potential to improve wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into topical creams, ointments, and gels, which can be applied directly to the affected area to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
